S.FORM: = Kim Jong-un = Mntucing hngkawas 1984 idas 1 jiyax 8 ka Kim Jong-un ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Korea, north ta sayang o kiya ka Kim Jong-un, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 5 jiyax 9 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = kim ɟoŋ-un = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka kim ɟoŋ-un ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan koɾəa, noɾtħ ta sajaŋ o kija ka kim ɟoŋ-un, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Kim Jong-un = Mntucing hngkawas 1984 idas 1 jiyax 8 ka Kim Jong-un ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Korea, north ta sayang o kiya ka Kim Jong-un, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 5 jiyax 9 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = kim ɟoŋ-un = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka kim ɟoŋ-un ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan koɾəa, noɾtħ ta sajaŋ o kija ka kim ɟoŋ-un, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
